Class CreateWellformedCond

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JAbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractTermTransformer
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.CreateWellformedCond
All Implemented Interfaces:
TermTransformer, Sorted, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement, TerminalSyntaxElement
public final class CreateWellformedCond extends AbstractTermTransformer
Creates the wellformedness condition for the given anonymizing heap terms if they apply for the current profile and modality type. At least generates the "wellFormed(anon_heap_LOOP)" condition for the anonymized standard heap.

  • Field Summary

  • Method Details

    • transform

      public JTerm transform(JTerm term, SVInstantiations svInst, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: TermTransformer
      initiates term transformation of term. Note the top level operator of of parameter term has to be this term transformer.
